The Barstewards Enquiry reposteó The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 1h En respuesta a @david_murphy698
@Stephenh61 y @nickluck Richard Flint, Kenny Alexander were the architects, they presented it to James Noyes and he approved it. He has since seen how the operators abused them, the BGC under Dugher welcomed them for years. Now James has realised that they aren't reducing harm and it's time to reverse. 1 4 824

item.title: brucemillington: Bruce Millington @brucemillington · 48min Regardless of your view on whether or not that was a Liverpool pen, the speed
item.description: Bruce Millington @brucemillington · 48min Regardless of your view on whether or not that was a Liverpool pen, the speed with which it was reviewed and reversed was impressive. If that had been the Stockley Park mob they’d still be looking at it. 5 6 1 mil

The Barstewards Enquiry reposteó Dubai Ace @DubaiAce · 58min En respuesta a @BarstewardsThe
@Stephenh61 y @nickluck This situation has been totally created by the bookies who have closed & restricted accounts & problem gambling with FOBTS. They were restricted to 4 per shop but got round that by opening more shops, The BHA were quite happy the situation & are now crying wolf. No sympathy 1 1 1 489
